## Privacy & security checklist

dictate is a privacy-first project. Please confirm:

- [ ] No telemetry, analytics, or third-party reporting added
- [ ] No new network calls except to user-configured local / OpenRouter endpoints
- [ ] No new file or shell-out paths run on untrusted input without validation
- [ ] No secrets, personal paths, or hostnames included in code, tests, or fixtures
- [ ] No `eval`, `pickle.load`, `yaml.load` (unsafe), or `subprocess shell=True` introduced

## General checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] Docs updated (README / docs / FAQ), if user-visible
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` updated, if conventions changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `Unreleased`
